publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-05-08 02:01:25 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Claude Livingston Kulp papers
did.abstract: State, county, and school educational surveys; course materials and student reports; reference materials and pamphlets; materials from conferences and other professional activities of Claude L. Kulp.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Claude Livingston Kulp was a professor of education at Cornell University, and served as superintendent of Ithaca Public Schools, 1930-1951. He was associate commissioner of the State Department of Education briefly, and served in many other positions as an educational administrator. As an education professor at Cornell, he organized or participated in more than 40 state, county, and school educational surveys.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: State, county, and school educational surveys; course materials and student reports; reference materials and pamphlets; materials from conferences and other professional activities of Claude L. Kulp.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Claude Livingston Kulp. Papers, #2866. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

unittitle.extref: Link to a partial finding aid.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: (1 press release and several clippings out of chronological order)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 3 booklets: 1. Bylaws - Bd. Of Education - Buffalo N.Y. Revised for 1952, June 25. 2. Personnel Policies - Buffalo Bd. Of Ed. 3/28/56. 3. Directory - Offices and Schools - Jan. 1955.
